demographics.living_situation: lives at home with spouse, who is helping with all movement

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My thighs and shoulders ache so badly I can't even stand up from the toilet, and I feel like I've run a marathon.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Over the past week the aching and weakness in my legs and shoulders has got so bad that I can't get out of a chair or off the toilet without my wife hauling me up, and I'm frightened I'll fall.

symptom_narrative.onset: came on gradually over the past week or so
symptom_narrative.duration: about a week, and it keeps getting worse
symptom_narrative.character: a deep aching and heaviness in the big muscles of my thighs, backside and shoulders, with real weakness — like my legs just won't hold me
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: severe — I feel like I've run a marathon, and I can't stand up from a low chair or the toilet on my own
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: both thighs, my backside and both shoulders — the same on each side
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: it's there all the time, and it's worse the moment I try to move or walk even to the kitchen
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really — resting doesn't seem to fix it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any movement at all; even a short walk to the kitchen wears me right out
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: just the weakness and heaviness in the muscles; no numbness or pins and needles, and when I go to the toilet my water looks a normal colour
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've never had anything like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: my wife has to help me move from the bed to a chair and on and off the toilet; I feel very unsteady and scared of falling

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: high cholesterol, looked after by a heart specialist
past_medical_history.how_managed: a cholesterol-lowering tablet from my cardiologist

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: a cholesterol tablet from my heart specialist — the strength was doubled about a month ago
current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: the dose was recently put up, roughly four weeks back

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: an antibiotic I started recently for a chest/respiratory infection

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: older adult living at home with my wife, who is now helping me with everything; our sofa is very low and I'm struggling and frightened of falling getting out of it

objective_data_offered.value: my urine looks a normal clear yellow — not dark, brown or tea-coloured
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's own visual impression; does not exclude a rising muscle-enzyme level or early muscle breakdown

objective_data_offered.value: on video he is visibly uncomfortable, shifting his weight, and needs his wife's help to get up out of the chair
